Figure 6. (a) Solution of the boundary value problem in Experiment 4 (6.6), the approximation by an SV-PINN trained with L-BFGS for 5, 000 steps and its pointwise error. (b) Average L2 relative error with ˘ one standard error over the 3 repetitions at all training steps for each method and optimiser.

Table 6.1. L2 relative error and training time of solving the boundary value problems in Experiment 2 (6.4) with PINNs and SV-PINNs trained by gradient descent (GD) and L-BFGS. The values are the average over 3 repetitions after 1, 000 and 5, 000 training steps with the respective standard deviation in parentheses. The number of steps to achieve L2-relative error ă 0.01 is also presented for the cases in which all repetitions achieved this threshold in 5, 000 steps.
